Support
Product support included
What's product support?
In the event that your product does not work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, repair services, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, help videos and free replacement for missing or broken parts. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differs by product and country. Learn more
Legal warranty
Available
Warranty and Repairs
Get a repair if you experience an item defect under legal warranty. If your item cannot be repaired, get a replacement or refund. The legal warranty against hidden defects also applies. Learn more
Insurance plans
Available
Cover against accidental damage or theft
After adding the product to the basket, you can select an insurance plan to protect your product against accidental damage, theft or to extend the manufacturer warranty.
Customer
service
Amazon
Customer service
Amazon handles customer service for this product.
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more
Gift options
Available at checkout
Available at checkout This item is a gift. Change
At checkout, you can add a custom message, a gift receipt for easy returns and have the item gift-wrapped

The was price is the median selling price paid by customers for a product on Amazon.co.uk (excluding prices when the product has been on promotion for a limited time and Amazon Haul or Amazon Now prices). For Amazon Fresh offers, the price is calculated as the median price offered locally for at least seven days of the last 90 days (excluding promotional prices).

Amazon Monthly Payments
(no application required)
This monthly payments offer will not apply to accessories, warranties, or other items in your order.

At checkout, your initial payment will include your firstly monthly payment plus delivery costs in full. We'll charge your credit card when we dispatch your item(s). Each monthly payment will include the appropriate proportion of VAT.

Your down payment will be equivalent to one installment payment, shipping, and add-on charges in full, when we ship your item(s).

The remaining payments will be automatically charged to your credit card in equal installments according to the number of payments indicated when you selected the monthly payment option, every 30 days from shipment date. Each monthly payment will include the appropriate portion of VAT.

For example, if you select 5 monthly payments for an item that is £100 (inclusive of VAT) with £5 shipping, you would pay a down payment of £25 (one installment payment inclusive of VAT and shipping charges) at the time your item ships and 4 remaining payments of £20 every 30 days after your item ships.

This offer can be used with most credit cards, and you can continue to earn existing credit card rewards. Standard credit card fees apply.
Gift cards (including Trade-in cards) cannot be applied towards Amazon Monthly Installment payments.
See Terms & Conditions
Back
Instalments by Barclays
(application required)
Instalments by Barclays is a reusable credit line that lets you spread the cost of purchases over £100 across fixed monthly payments.
If approved, you can make as many purchases as you like without reapplying. Barclays will check your financial circumstances haven’t changed each time and the amount you’ll pay is within your credit and monthly payment limits. These checks won’t affect your credit score.
Approval is subject to application, financial circumstances and borrowing history. Representative Example: Credit Limit: £1200, Annual Interest Rate 19.2% (variable), Representative 19.2% APR (variable).

From time to time, promotional rates may be available, including 0%.

The retailer, Amazon EU S.a.r.l., acts solely as a credit broker and introduces customers to credit products from Barclays on a non-exclusive basis and is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority with number 746485. UK Office Address 1 Principal Place, Worship S, London EC2A 2FA. UK Establishment Number: BR017427

Amazon Monthly Payments (no application required)
  • This monthly payments offer will not apply to accessories, warranties, or other items in your order.

  • At checkout, your initial payment will include your firstly monthly payment plus delivery costs in full. We'll charge your credit card when we dispatch your item(s). Each monthly payment will include the appropriate proportion of VAT.

    Your down payment will be equivalent to one installment payment, shipping, and add-on charges in full, when we ship your item(s).

    The remaining payments will be automatically charged to your credit card in equal installments according to the number of payments indicated when you selected the monthly payment option, every 30 days from shipment date. Each monthly payment will include the appropriate portion of VAT.

    For example, if you select 5 monthly payments for an item that is £100 (inclusive of VAT) with £5 shipping, you would pay a down payment of £25 (one installment payment inclusive of VAT and shipping charges) at the time your item ships and 4 remaining payments of £20 every 30 days after your item ships.

  • This offer can be used with most credit cards, and you can continue to earn existing credit card rewards. Standard credit card fees apply.
  • Gift cards (including Trade-in cards) cannot be applied towards Amazon Monthly Installment payments.

About this item

  • ENGINEERED FOR ELITE GAMING: Conquer the latest AAA titles and fast-paced esports with an Intel Core Ultra 7 265F 20-core CPU and GeForce RTX 5060 Ti 8GB GDDR7 GPU—delivering real-time ray tracing, AI frame generation, and buttery-smooth FPS.
  • COOLING UNDER CONTROL: With optimized air cooling and an improved airflow design, your system stays quiet and powerful even during long gaming sessions.
  • BUILT TO SHOW OFF: The bold Basalt Black design with a clear side panel and customizable AlienFX RGB lighting zones lets you personalize your setup and highlight your rig in any battlestation.
  • STREAM, MULTITASK, WIN: Crush gameplay, livestream in full quality, and switch apps effortlessly with 16GB DDR5 RAM and a blazing-fast 1TB NVMe SSD—perfect for creators and competitive players alike.
  • WI-FI 7 & GEN5 CONNECTIVITY: Enjoy ultra-fast wireless with Intel Wi-Fi 7 and seamless expansion with Gen5 PCIe slots and 2.5 Gbps Ethernet—ensuring top-tier performance in every game and stream.
  • FULL CONTROL WITH ALIENFX: Customize RGB lighting and fine-tune system performance through the Alienware Command Center — giving you immersive, intuitive control over your gaming experience.
  • WARRANTY: 1 Year of Alienware Care with 24/7 hardware and software support along with global coverage for your gaming adventure.

From the manufacturer

  1. Alienware Aurora Gaming Desktop


    The Alienware Aurora is engineered for exceptional performance with a streamlined, minimal design.

    • Intel Core Ultra 7 processor 265F (20-Core, 66MB Total Cache, 1.8GHz to 5.3GHz)
    • NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5060Ti 8GB GDDR7 Graphics
    • 1TB NVMe M.2 PCIe Solid State Drive
    • 16GB Dual Channel DDR5 (2x 8GB) 5200 MT/s Memory
    • 500W Platinum Rated PSU, Air-Cooled CPU & Clear Side Panel

  2. Playtime. Anytime


    Play the latest games with graphics that rival reality. Play with players on console. Play with the peripherals that you love. When it comes to playing your way, Windows 11 makes it happen.

  3. Game changing graphics


    Step into the future of gaming and creation with the NVIDIA GeForce RTX 50 Series, powered by NVIDIA Blackwell architecture. Designed to push boundaries, this GPU lineup delivers unparalleled AI performance and jaw-dropping graphics fidelity - perfect for those who demand the extraordinary.

    Ray Tracing Redefined: Experience cinematic realism with full ray tracing, brought to life by fourth-gen RT Cores. From stunning light reflections to intricate shadows, your in-game world.

  4. AI-Boosted Gameplay


    Unleash next-level speed and responsive gaming with DLSS 4. Achieve ultra-smooth frame rates with Multi Frame Generation and enhanced Ray Reconstruction powered by fifth-gen Tensor Cores.

    Competitive Advantage: Compete faster with NVIDIA Reflex 2 technology featuring Frame Warp, which further reduces latency based on the game’s latest mouse input.

  1. Top-tier gaming versatility


    The Alienware Aurora is engineered for exceptional performance with a streamlined, minimal design. This generation of Aurora desktops focuses on reducing acoustics while maintaining airflow, making it a perfect gaming system for any setting.

    Modern design with a matte "basalt black" finish in an optimized chassis with customizable AlienFX lighting zones, including the striking stadium lighting. Clear Side Panel for shows off the internal components, with the elevated Legend 3 industrial design.

  2. HEXAGONAL SIDE VENTS


    An array of hexagonally shaped vents enables passive air intake supporting graphics performance and quieter acoustics.

    Streamlined Desktop: Our Legend 3 design is echoed by the overall compact and functional size of the system, which is about 40% smaller by volume than the previous design and 53% smaller than the Area-51.

  3. CLEANER CABLE MANAGEMENT


    Seamless internal cable management reduces obstruction of airflow and keeps thermals efficiently managed.

    Front I/O flexibility: High performance front ports enable great connectivity and two of the USB ports include Power Share technology which lets you easily power your favorite external devices even while the system is shut down.

  4. Marathon gaming unlocked


    All Auroras are equipped with our 12-phase voltage regulation design. This high-performance technology ensures clean energy is consistently available, unleashing the top-level power of Intel Core Ultra processors as you game, livestream, and multi-task for hours on end.

Total command

Alienware Command Center software allows you to create and edit AlienFX lighting across the ecosystem.

Expressive gameplay

Show off your gaming style by customizing AlienFX lighting across your Alienware ecosystem with millions of colour combinations at your disposal.

Performance presets

Choose and monitor performance across distinct power states - quiet mode, balanced mode, and performance mode - according to your gaming preferences.

Game your way

Play through every game exactly how you want by creating customized gaming profiles for your whole library.

  1. Intentional thermal strategy


    Our design prioritizes airflow efficiency and improved acoustics by introducing larger passageways and optimized internal cable management resulting in 20% quieter operation, on average, and 7% lower temperatures compared to the Aurora R15. This approach - combined with air cooling CPU - contributes to an incredibly smooth gaming experience.

    Based on internal analysis, June 2023, using identical components. Performance may vary.

  2. Game cool and quietly


    Central to the Aurora thermal strategy is the increase in its ventilation's total surface area. This increase is the driving force behind the desktop's efficient airflow, cooling and acoustics.

    Optimized airflow strategy: The side hexagonal array, top surface exhaust, and the front stadium intake all provide significantly larger pathways for ambient air to enter and heat to be exhausted.

  3. More performance, quicker multitasking


    Upgradable parts enable gamers to tailor their experience and expand the lifespan of their PC.

    Gen5 PCIe performance: The Alienware Aurora includes the Intel Z890 chipset with three PCIe slots. The primary Gen5 PCIe slot provides x16 physical and electrical lanes devoted to maximum performance.

    Two additional Gen3 x4 PCIe slots are available but may not be accessible with most graphics options.

  4. Faster multitasking


    Load large games and handle intensive tasks with 16GB of DDR5 XMP memory.

    Two PCIe NVMe M.2: Enabling up to 8TB of total solid state storage space*.

    Available 3.5” hard disk drive: To store, run and archive any games, files, or applications.

Ports and slots

1. 1x Global headset jack | 2. 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) Type-A port | 3. 1x USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) Type-A port with Power Share technology | 4. 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) Type-C port with Power Share technology | 5. 1x Line In | 6. 1x SPDIF Digital Output (TOSLINK) | 7. 1x Line Out | 8. 1x USB 4 (20 Gbps) Type-C port | 9. 2x USB 3.2 Gen 1 (5 Gbps) Type-A port | 10. 2x USB 2.0 Type-A ports with Smart Power technology | 11. 1x USB 3.2 Gen 2 (10 Gbps) Type-C port | 12. 1x RJ-45 Killer E3100G 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet

Purchase model configurations will vary. Subject to third party purchase of additional storage or available separately via upgrade. SSDs are user-replaceable for up to 8TB of total SSD storage. Purchase model has up to 1TB SSD only.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings, help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyses reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    • lainemichella
      5.0 out of 5 stars Beautiful graphics
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 7 November 2025
      processor_description: Core Ultra 7-265Fmemory_size: 16 GBHard Disk Size: 1 TBGraphics description: NVIDIA RTX 5060TiVerified Purchase
      I'm not sure why people gave this 1 star. It's a lovely machine in looks and performance. It runs my games at roughly 180FPS. It's very quiet to run even in performance mode (there is a quiet option and I'm guessing it would be silent). Although I don't use the lighting, it has so so many options. It kept me amused for quite a while trying them all and even making my own sequence!. You can buy it with confidence.
